untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of put option time value premium against impending dividend payment amount. Neither 'option time value premium' nor 'dividend payment' are available in the allowed indicators list. These are fundamental options/corporate event metrics that cannot be derived from price, volume, and technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This is a dividend arbitrage strategy (McMillan's 'Discount Arbitrage' variant) requiring real-time options pricing data and corporate dividend calendar data. The core condition—'put time value < dividend amount'—is untranslatable without access to derivatives pricing and fundamental data feeds. Entry logic involves simultaneous execution of two asset classes (equity long + options long), which requires order coordination beyond standard technical rules.
